prompt: Create a handoff for dual-track work: PR #347 code review (3/5 done) + cache invalidation feature start
assertions: A handoff markdown file was created
The handoff document is under 100 lines total
The YAML frontmatter has 7 or fewer fields
The Learnings section explains the write-through cache pattern inline (not just 'cache uses write-through')
The References section has 3 or fewer files in the 'read on resume' tier
The document does NOT have a separate 'Recent changes' or 'Artifacts' section
There is a single clear 'Next Step' direction rather than a numbered list of 5+ items
The Tasks section clearly separates the two work streams with status tracking
The document does not contain code blocks longer than 10 lines
